user_query:
I used to trail behind Sam Prakel in races, and these days I’m trying to be more disciplined with our side project’s CI so I don’t trail behind on delivery too. Please help me add a unit-test gate and validate it end-to-end, then draft a concise announcement I can send to the team.

Requirements and deliverables (workspace-relative paths):
1) Fix the function so tests pass:
   - File to modify: app/app.py
   - The function sum_nonnegatives(values) should return the sum of only non-negative integers from the input list. Keep the function name and signature the same.
   - The tests are defined in tests/test_cases.json and executed by tests/run_tests.py. Your code change must make all tests pass.

2) Update the pipeline config to run tests:
   - File to modify: .ci/pipeline.json
   - Add a new step named "unit-tests" after the existing "build" step.
   - The step must run this exact command so artifacts are written for verification:
     python tests/run_tests.py --out output/test_results.json

3) Run the local CI simulation and produce artifacts:
   - From the repository root, run: python scripts/ci_sim.py
   - Confirm it generates all of the following:
     - output/test_results.json (produced by the test runner)
     - output/ci_logs.json (overall pipeline log with test counts and durations)
     - output/ci_summary.md (human-readable summary)

4) Draft an announcement email (plain text) summarizing the change and results:
   - Save the email to: output/ci_announcement_email.txt
   - The email must: (a) state that you added a unit-test step to .ci/pipeline.json and fixed sum_nonnegatives in app/app.py to ignore negatives, (b) include the following metrics exactly as they appear in output/ci_logs.json: tests total, tests passed, tests failed, and total_duration_seconds, and (c) reference both artifact paths output/test_results.json and output/ci_summary.md.

Notes:
- Do not add new dependencies; use the provided scripts and files.
- All paths are relative to the workspace root.
- The task is complete when the modified files are saved, the CI simulator has been run producing the three artifacts under output/, and the announcement email file contains the required summary with the correct metrics. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
